summary: The diff implements backend logging and modifies the frontend to call isPersistentAdmin() instead of isCallerAdmin(), but does not show evidence of fixing the core isCallerAdmin method or verifying adminPrincipals HashMap initialization as requested. The backend changes are truncated, preventing full verification of REQ-122 and REQ-123.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the backend isCallerAdmin method in backend/main.mo to correctly authenticate the owner with principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' and return true instead of false
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows backend/main.mo is truncated and does not include the isCallerAdmin method implementation. The frontend was changed to call isPersistentAdmin() instead of isCallerAdmin(), suggesting the method may not have been fixed as specified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Verify the adminPrincipals HashMap initialization in backend/main.mo correctly stores the owner principal during actor initialization
missing_requirements.reason: While the diff shows adminPrincipals variable and defaultAdminPrincipals array with the owner principal, the truncated backend file does not show the initialization logic that populates the HashMap or verification that the lookup succeeds.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add comprehensive backend logging in the isCallerAdmin method
missing_requirements.reason: The backend file is truncated before showing the isCallerAdmin method implementation. No evidence of logging statements in isCallerAdmin showing caller principal, HashMap lookup result, HashMap size, stored principals, or return value.

hallucinated_features.description: Changed frontend to call isPersistentAdmin() instead of isCallerAdmin()
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly requires fixing isCallerAdmin and maintaining existing authentication flow. Changing the method being called from isCallerAdmin to isPersistentAdmin represents a significant change not requested in any requirement.
